nodes.name: users
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: users - stores user accounts, auth info, MFA settings

nodes.name: refresh_tokens
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: refresh_tokens - stores JWT refresh tokens with rotation

nodes.name: verification_tokens
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: verification_tokens - stores email verification and password reset tokens

nodes.name: installed_modules
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: installed_modules - tracks installed platform modules

nodes.name: module_audit_log
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: module_audit_log - audit trail for module install/uninstall operations

nodes.name: ai_query_log
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: ai_query_log - tracks AI query usage and costs (Vertex AI)

nodes.name: user_mfa
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: user_mfa - stores MFA secrets and TOTP configuration

nodes.name: mfa_backup_codes
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: mfa_backup_codes - stores hashed MFA backup codes

nodes.name: mfa_audit_log
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: mfa_audit_log - audit trail for MFA enable/disable/verify actions

nodes.name: mfa_pending_tokens
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: mfa_pending_tokens - temporary tokens during MFA login flow

nodes.name: admin_audit_log
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: admin_audit_log - audit trail for admin actions (role changes, status updates)

nodes.name: farms
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: farms - stores farm documents with location, manager, and metadata

nodes.name: blocks
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: blocks - stores farm blocks (physical and virtual) with state machine

nodes.name: plant_data
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: plant_data - simple plant catalog schema

nodes.name: plant_data_enhanced
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: plant_data_enhanced - comprehensive plant library with growth cycles, farm type compatibility

nodes.name: plantings
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: plantings - stores planting plans with block assignments

nodes.name: block_cycles
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: block_cycles - historical growing cycles for blocks

nodes.name: daily_harvests
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: daily_harvests - individual daily harvest entries

nodes.name: harvests
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: harvests - aggregated harvest summaries

nodes.name: block_harvests
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: block_harvests - harvest records per block with farming year

nodes.name: block_archives
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: block_archives - archived growing cycles for historical reference

nodes.name: alerts
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: alerts - block alerts with severity, status, and resolution

nodes.name: farm_tasks
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: farm_tasks - operations task manager for farming activities

nodes.name: farmer_assignments
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: farmer_assignments - assigns farmers/workers to specific farms

nodes.name: farm_assignments
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: farm_assignments - maps users to farms for access control

nodes.name: stock_inventory
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: stock_inventory - farm stock/harvest inventory for FIFO tracking

nodes.name: inventory_harvest
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: inventory_harvest - harvest inventory items with quality grades

nodes.name: inventory_input
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: inventory_input - farm input supplies (seeds, fertilizer, chemicals)

nodes.name: inventory_asset
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: inventory_asset - farm equipment and asset tracking

nodes.name: inventory_movements
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: inventory_movements - tracks inventory transfers and usage

nodes.name: products
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: products - master product catalog for inventory

nodes.name: system_config
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: system_config - stores farming year config and spacing standards

nodes.name: weather_cache
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: weather_cache - caches WeatherBit API responses

nodes.name: employees
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: employees - HR employee records with Arabic name support

nodes.name: employee_contracts
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: employee_contracts - employment contract records

nodes.name: employee_visas
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: employee_visas - visa and work permit tracking (UAE)

nodes.name: employee_insurance
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: employee_insurance - employee insurance policy records

nodes.name: employee_performance
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: employee_performance - performance review records

nodes.name: customers
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: customers - CRM customer records (individual and business)

nodes.name: sales_orders
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: sales_orders - sales order records with items and payment status

nodes.name: harvest_inventory
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: harvest_inventory - sales module harvest inventory with quality grades

nodes.name: purchase_orders
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: purchase_orders - purchase order records from suppliers

nodes.name: return_orders
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: return_orders - customer return/refund order records

nodes.name: vehicles
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: vehicles - fleet vehicle records with maintenance tracking

nodes.name: routes
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: routes - delivery route definitions with stops

nodes.name: shipments
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: shipments - shipment tracking records

nodes.name: marketing_campaigns
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: marketing_campaigns - marketing campaign records

nodes.name: marketing_budgets
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: marketing_budgets - marketing budget allocations

nodes.name: marketing_channels
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: marketing_channels - marketing channel definitions

nodes.name: marketing_events
nodes.description: MongoDB collection: marketing_events - marketing event records

nodes.name: APP_NAME
nodes.description: Application display name (default: A64 Core Platform API Hub)

nodes.name: ENVIRONMENT
nodes.description: Runtime environment: development, staging, production

nodes.name: DEBUG
nodes.description: Debug mode flag (must be False in production)

nodes.name: HOST
nodes.description: Server bind host (default: 0.0.0.0)

nodes.name: PORT
nodes.description: Server port (default: 8000)

nodes.name: ALLOWED_ORIGINS
nodes.description: CORS allowed origins list for frontend access

nodes.name: MONGODB_URL
nodes.description: MongoDB connection URL

nodes.name: MONGODB_DB_NAME
nodes.description: MongoDB database name (default: a64core_db)

nodes.name: SECRET_KEY
nodes.description: JWT signing secret key (must be changed in production)

nodes.name: API_KEY_PREFIX
nodes.description: Prefix for generated API keys

nodes.name: FRONTEND_URL
nodes.description: Frontend URL for email links and CORS

nodes.name: FROM_EMAIL
nodes.description: Email sender address for system emails

nodes.name: LOG_LEVEL
nodes.description: Logging level (default: INFO)

nodes.name: GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT
nodes.description: Google Cloud project ID for Vertex AI

nodes.name: VERTEX_AI_LOCATION
nodes.description: Vertex AI region (default: us-central1)

nodes.name: VERTEX_AI_MODEL
nodes.description: Vertex AI model name (default: gemini-2.5-flash)

nodes.name: VERTEX_AI_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS
nodes.description: Maximum output tokens for Vertex AI responses

nodes.name: VERTEX_AI_TEMPERATURE
nodes.description: Vertex AI sampling temperature (default: 0.1)

nodes.name: FARM_AI_MAX_TOKENS
nodes.description: Max tokens for Farm AI Chat responses

nodes.name: FARM_AI_DAILY_LIMIT
nodes.description: Daily limit on Farm AI Chat queries per user

nodes.name: RATE_LIMIT_GUEST
nodes.description: Rate limit per minute for guest users (default: 30)

nodes.name: RATE_LIMIT_USER
nodes.description: Rate limit per minute for regular users (default: 300)

nodes.name: RATE_LIMIT_MODERATOR
nodes.description: Rate limit per minute for moderators (default: 500)

nodes.name: RATE_LIMIT_ADMIN
nodes.description: Rate limit per minute for admins (default: 1000)

nodes.name: RATE_LIMIT_SUPER_ADMIN
nodes.description: Rate limit per minute for super admins (default: 2000)

nodes.name: MYSQL_HOST
nodes.description: MySQL host (.env.example only - secondary DB)

nodes.name: MYSQL_PORT
nodes.description: MySQL port (.env.example only - secondary DB)

nodes.name: MYSQL_USER
nodes.description: MySQL user (.env.example only)

nodes.name: MYSQL_PASSWORD
nodes.description: MySQL password (.env.example only)

nodes.name: MYSQL_DB_NAME
nodes.description: MySQL database name (.env.example only)

nodes.name: ADMIN_EMAIL
nodes.description: Admin email for cron service authentication

nodes.name: ADMIN_PASSWORD
nodes.description: Admin password for cron service authentication

nodes.name: MONGO_ROOT_USERNAME
nodes.description: MongoDB root user for production authentication

nodes.name: MONGO_ROOT_PASSWORD
nodes.description: MongoDB root password for production authentication

nodes.name: MONGO_APP_USER
nodes.description: MongoDB application user for production

nodes.name: MONGO_APP_PASSWORD
nodes.description: MongoDB application password for production

nodes.name: REDIS_URL
nodes.description: Redis connection URL for caching and rate limiting

nodes.name: REDIS_PASSWORD
nodes.description: Redis authentication password

nodes.name: MODULE_REGISTRY_PATH
nodes.description: Path to module registry JSON configuration

nodes.name: LICENSE_ENCRYPTION_KEY
nodes.description: Encryption key for module license validation (Fernet + PBKDF2)

nodes.name: DOCKER_REGISTRY_URL
nodes.description: Docker registry URL for module images

nodes.name: DOCKER_REGISTRY_USERNAME
nodes.description: Docker registry authentication username

nodes.name: DOCKER_REGISTRY_PASSWORD
nodes.description: Docker registry authentication password

nodes.name: MAX_MODULES
nodes.description: Maximum number of installable modules

nodes.name: MAX_MODULES_PER_USER
nodes.description: Maximum modules per user

nodes.name: MODULE_INSTALL_TIMEOUT
nodes.description: Module installation timeout in seconds

nodes.name: TRUSTED_REGISTRIES
nodes.description: Comma-separated list of trusted Docker registries

nodes.name: LICENSE_VALIDATION_MODE
nodes.description: License validation mode: format (offline) or online

nodes.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
nodes.description: Anthropic Claude API key for Farm AI Chat

nodes.name: ANTHROPIC_MODEL
nodes.description: Anthropic Claude model ID for Farm AI Chat

nodes.name: PYTHONPATH
nodes.description: Python module search path (docker-compose: /app/src)

nodes.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS
nodes.description: Path to Google Cloud service account JSON for Vertex AI

nodes.name: WEATHERBIT_API_KEY
nodes.description: WeatherBit API key for agricultural weather data

nodes.name: WEATHERBIT_ENABLED
nodes.description: Enable/disable WeatherBit integration

nodes.name: UVICORN_WORKERS
nodes.description: Number of Uvicorn worker processes

nodes.name: MONGO_INITDB_DATABASE
nodes.description: MongoDB initial database name for container startup

nodes.name: NODE_ENV
nodes.description: Node.js environment for user-portal frontend

nodes.name: VITE_API_URL
nodes.description: Vite build-time and runtime API URL for frontend

nodes.name: VITE_API_TARGET
nodes.description: Vite dev server proxy target (Docker network: http://api:8000)

nodes.name: BACKUP_RETENTION_DAILY
nodes.description: Number of daily MongoDB backups to retain

nodes.name: BACKUP_RETENTION_WEEKLY
nodes.description: Number of weekly MongoDB backups to retain

nodes.name: BACKUP_RETENTION_MONTHLY
nodes.description: Number of monthly MongoDB backups to retain

nodes.name: ENCRYPT_BACKUPS
nodes.description: Enable AES-256 encryption for MongoDB backups

nodes.name: BACKUP_ENCRYPTION_KEY
nodes.description: AES-256 encryption key for backup encryption
